title: Understand
goal: Build fundamental understanding of planning principles and context
keyAreas: Insight into roles, responsibilities and governance
Foundational knowledge of data (sources, definitions, limitations)
Introduction to tools and systems used
Understanding the 'why' behind processes and decisions

title: Apply
goal: Correctly execute standard processes and activities
keyAreas: Working with systems and standard templates
behaviors: Delivers consistent output within set boundaries

title: Control
goal: Execute independently and reliably with a focus on control

title: Improve
goal: Continuously improve processes, data and decision-making
keyAreas: Optimising data use and process flows

title: Innovate
goal: Develop new ways of working and drive change
keyAreas: Stimulating innovation in tools and processes
Coaching teams and acting as Subject Matter Expert (SME)
